title: ophiopogon ohwii
intro: Ophiopogon ohwii, also known as Lian Qiao, is a type of flowering plant in the asparagus family, native to China. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ophiopogon ohwii include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Ophiopogon ohwii is often used as an ingredient in teas, tinctures, and capsules, and is commonly combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
